title: lippia turnerifolia var. polytricha
intro: Lippia turnerifolia var. polytricha, also known as Lippia polytricha, is a plant species in the family Verbenaceae, commonly found in tropical regions and known for its medicinal properties. The leaves and stems of this plant contain essential oils, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, contributing to its potential health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as being used as an antiseptic and antihelmintic agent. Lippia polytricha can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in folk medicine as a treatment for various ailments.
